response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned polyglot engineer with 20+ years of broad experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, satisfying the language and tenure requirements on paper. However, the Principal Software Engineer — Growth / Experimentation Systems role demands deep, specialized expertise in experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, and statistical/metrics analysis — none of which appear anywhere in the resume. The candidate's current work centers on full-stack TypeScript product engineering and AI-agent tooling, not growth systems or systematic experimentation. The IC6/Principal level also implies cross-organizational technical leadership within the specific domain of growth and measurement, which is not evidenced here.
strengths: 20+ years of polyglot engineering covering JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, C#, Java, and DLang, satisfying the language breadth requirement
Proven distributed systems work at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second demonstrates production-at-scale credibility
Staff-level role at re:cinq with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling contributions shows platform-oriented thinking and some technical leadership
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience — no mention of A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment, bias detection, or rollout-risk management anywhere in the resume
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background — the role's core mandate around instrumentation, measurement pipelines, and statistical analysis is entirely absent
Current seniority and domain focus (full-stack product + AI tooling) are misaligned with the IC6 Principal-level growth and experimentation specialization the role demands

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure experience
